videos.description: Cornell Hatcher Jr. scores a touchdown to give Oregon State a 24-10 lead.

videos.headline: Weigman connects with Koziol for a 50-yard game-tying TD
videos.description: Houston's Conner Weigman hits Tanner Koziol in stride and he takes it to the house to tie the score at 24.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Conner Weigman connects with Tanner Koziol for a 50-yard game-tying TD) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Houston blocks Oregon State's winning FG attempt to force OT
videos.description: Multiple Houston defenders break through to block Cameron Smith's winning field goal attempt for Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Houston blocks Oregon State's winning FG attempt to force OT) 2025/09/27 ESHEET

videos.headline: Houston completes comeback with winning field goal in overtime
videos.description: Ethan Sanchez drills a 24-yard field goal to complete Houston's comeback to defeat Oregon State.
